title: Support rand fields of dynamic array types

features.name: class with rand dynamic array field
features.description: Code should include a class containing a rand-qualified dynamic array field declared with empty queue brackets

features.name: dynamic array allocation and randomization
features.description: Code should include instantiation of a class with rand dynamic array, allocation of the dynamic array, and call to randomize()

features.name: rand queue field in class
features.description: Code should include a class containing a rand-qualified queue field declared with dollar queue brackets
